teamObjective.explanation: Partner (player 2) is down to 2 cards and tagged as near_finish, so the immediate team objective is to create a lead they can beat so they retain or regain control and finish their hand. My own hand has only low non-trump diamonds, so I cannot realistically win or carry the trick myself.

partnerBelief.summary: Partner likely has one or two playable cards remaining and is trying to exit. With only 2 cards, they probably retain at least one card that can beat a low non-trump single, but this is uncertain because their exact ranks and suits are hidden.

opponentBelief.summary: Opponents (players 1 and 3) each hold 3 cards. They know nothing about my hand yet and will try to stop my partner from finishing, but since no cards have been played, their exact strength is unknown. Either opponent may have a card that beats a low diamond single.

actionRationale.primaryReason: Lead the lowest non-trump single (diamond 3). This discards my weakest card, makes it as easy as possible for my near-finish partner to win the trick, and minimizes the chance that opponents gain a large tempo advantage if they take the lead.

whyNotAlternatives.reason: Slightly higher than the 3, so it is marginally harder for partner to beat while still being a weak non-trump card.
Higher rank offers no real advantage against opponents and reduces the probability partner can take the trick with a small card.
The highest card in a very weak hand; keeping it provides no defensive value and makes it hardest for partner to win the lead.

risks: An opponent may beat the low diamond lead and gain control, delaying partner's finish.
Partner may be unable to beat even a 3, in which case the trick is lost.
I have no trumps or bombs, so I cannot recover control if opponents seize it.
riskAssessment.mitigation: Leading the absolute lowest legal card minimizes the rank an opponent or partner needs to win, which is the best available play given the weak hand and partner-near-finish situation.

notes: No trump cards and no playable bombs are available; all legal options are weak non-trump singles, so the priority is enabling partner rather than winning the trick myself.
